figures.caption: Figure 1. Overview of the proposed dual-branch framework for the NTIRE 2026 remote sensing infrared super-resolution challenge. The HAT-L and MambaIRv2-L branches operate independently and their outputs are combined through fixed equal-weight image-space fusion.
Figure 2. Qualitative comparison on representative public thermal synthetic ×4 samples. Columns are GT, Bicubic, MambaIRv2, HAT, and Fusion.
